title: Movie Review
text:
## Movie Review

Critics call it the most {adjective} film of the season.

**Starring:** {person} as a {adjective} hero who must {verb} across a {adjective} landscape to recover a stolen {object}.

**Villain:** Played by a {adjective} celebrity, who wants to {verb} the world using only a {object} and poor timing.

**Best scene:** A {adjective} chase through a {place} while {adjective} music swells.

**Worst scene:** Someone tries to {verb} a {animal} and fails.

**Rating:** {number} stars and one {adjective} popcorn bucket.
